Interface IPolygon5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides additional operations on polygons.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("186EA039-B97F-4006-A69E-FF10FEA6C3CE")]
public interface IPolygon5 : IPolygon4, IPolygon3, IPolygon2, IPolygon, IPolycurve, ICurve, IGeometry
